## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Kelvin Gitari as a new content manager at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kelvin to complete company-wide onboarding tasks (day 1, week 1) followed by 2-week CM bootcamp](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - Key tools: Slack, Gitbot, Linear, Notion, Zoom, Fathom; <team@growthxlabs.com> email for shared access
  - [Unlimited PTO policy; 4hr Pacific time overlap required; daily Gitbot updates mandatory](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Upcoming calls: Kyle (today), Marcel (Wed); read/watch materials before Marcel's call](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

## Topics

### Introduction and Background

  - [Alice: GrowthX assistant since July, supports operations/engineering, handles tool access](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Kelvin: Content writer (5 years), joined GrowthX Nov 2024, worked with Nika and Vivek](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Both based in Nairobi; Alice works Pacific time (7:30am-4:30pm PT)](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Tools Overview

  - [Slack: Quick team communication, channels for different pods/teams](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Gitbot: Daily stand-ups, integrated with Slack, responds within shift](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Linear: Project management, tracking onboarding tasks](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Notion: Knowledge management, SOPs, client shared workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Others: Airtable, SEMrush, Loom, Zoom, Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Notion handbook: Day 1 (tool setup, team intros), Week 1 (reading, workshops, meetings)](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Linear project: "Company-wide onboarding" and "2-week CM onboarding bootcamp"](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [Meetings: Kyle (today), Marcel (Wednesday) - group sessions with other new hires](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

### Company Structure and Expectations

  - [Hierarchy: CTO \> Directors \> Managing Editors \> Content Managers](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Pods: Groups under managing editors, focus on specific clients](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [4-hour Pacific time overlap required](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Daily Gitbot updates mandatory (once added to a pod)](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Unlimited PTO policy with advance notice (except emergencies)](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Referral bonuses: $10k USD (engineering), $5k USD (non-engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Administrative Setup

  - [IT support channel on Slack (tag Yusuf or Alice)](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Biweekly all-hands meetings (next one tomorrow, brief intro expected)](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - <team@growthxlabs.com> email setup for shared access and client communication

## Next Steps

  - [Join Kyle's onboarding call (today at 7pm local time)](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Complete day 1 onboarding tasks in Linear/Notion](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Read company materials and watch Marcel's workshop before Wednesday's call](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Prepare brief introduction for tomorrow's all-hands meeting](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Connect with Nana (Panzer's EA) to schedule 1:1 with manager](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Begin week 1 onboarding tasks, moving to CM bootcamp after completion](https://fathom.video/share/7Y1SHFxEHNnRZvM-LjtD8gURdGBWzxNS?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
